title: Messages disappear from inbox
creator: dawhit50
content: After I read a new message in my Inbox, it seems to disappear from the Inbox. It still shows up in All Mail, and I can find it using the search function, but it no longer appears in my Inbox. Pixel 9a, Android v16 OS. Thanks

title: mail lists for Thunderbird for Android
creator: Alan.online
content:
Hi,

I am trying to and failing to get my mail lists into Thunderbird for Android. I have tried lots of searches but can get nothing related to this.

I have imported by settings into Thunderbird for Android but the mail lists do not come across.

I have imported by email addresses into the Contacts app. This was the only way I could find to do this - Thunderbird for Android does not have the facility to import email addresses. Is that right? However, the mail lists do not get exported or imported.

I have manually recreated the email lists in the contacts app. However, if I use Thunderbird for Android and ask to use an address from the Contacts, these are still not showing.

Is there ANY way I can get my mail lists (which I use a lot!) into Thunderbird for Android.

Sorry if there is an obvious answer to this and I have missed and thanks in advance.

Yours,

Alan
